basic_details.job_title: J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of J.N. Medical College Hospital. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing, Registered as Nurse and Midwife
qualification.details: Diploma in General Nursing & Midwifery / B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing degree from a recognized Institution. Registered as Nurse and Midwife at the State Nurse & Midwives Registration Council, by whichever name constituted, by the respective State Government.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for J.N. Medical College Hospital Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
